page_metadata.biotools__summary: HaloDom is a database of halophilic organisms across all life domains. It provides taxonomy info, halotolerance classification, salinity metadata, genomic/proteomic links and publication info.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: HaloDom is a database of halophilic organisms across all life domains. It provides taxonomy info, halotolerance classification, salinity metadata, genomic/proteomic links and publication info.
